---
title: "<i class='bi bi-card-image'></i> Gallery"
description: "A curated collection of charts and visualizations. Some are crafted using data from popular challenges like #TidyTuesday and the #30DayMapChallenge. However, my collection goes beyond that. I'm always coming across interesting datasets that I feel deserve a clearer, more visual representation."
lang: en
link-external-newwindow: true
page-layout: full
comments: false
title-block-banner: true
css: ../assets/styles/custom-style.css
lightbox: true
format:
  html:
    smooth-scroll: true
---

## <i class="bi bi-mouse2"></i> Interactive charts

This is a collection of interactive charts. Interactivity in data can be a powerful tool for helping the reader better understand the data. The main reason I created this section is the need for accessible content and to provide an alternative that is more accessible than the static charts listed below. The charts in the other subsections of this page are static with basic alternative texts. People who use screen readers are encouraged to first try the explore button that follows for a better user experience. I do my best to make my page more accessible. I also welcome corrections and feedback at my email if any issue arises or if you have any suggestions for improving the accessibility of my page.

```{=html}
<div class ="button_wrapper_gallery">
<a href="./interactive-charts"><button type="button" class="btn  btn-primary btn-rounded"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> Explore my interactive charts</button></a>
</div>
```

## <i class="bi bi-pie-chart"></i> 30 Day Chart Challenge

The [#30DayChartChallenge](https://github.com/30DayChartChallenge) is a global community challenge held every April on social media, inviting data analysts / scientists, developers, and visualization enthusiasts to create one chart per day for 30 days. Each day is assigned a different theme or chart type, encouraging creativity, data exploration, and the practice of analytical and design techniques.

```{=html}
<div class ="button_wrapper_gallery">
<a href="https://github.com/stesiam/30DayChartChallenge"><button type="button" class="btn  btn-primary btn-rounded"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> Explore my code</button></a>
</div>
```
::: {.grid .pt-3}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![Day 1, 30 Day Chart Challenge 2024](https://cdn.stesiam.com/day1-2024-cc-en-drk.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![Day 4, 30 Day Chart Challenge 2024](https://cdn.stesiam.com/day4-2024-cc-en.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![Day 15, 30 Day Chart Challenge 2024](https://cdn.stesiam.com/day15_dark-2024-cc.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![Day 23, 30 Day Chart Challenge 2024](https://cdn.stesiam.com/day23-2024-cc.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![Day 26, 30 Day Chart Challenge 2024](https://cdn.stesiam.com/day26-2024-cc.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![Day 28, 30 Day Chart Challenge 2024](https://cdn.stesiam.com/day28-2024-cc.png){group="plot"}
:::
:::

## <i class="bi bi-brush"></i> Tidy Tuesday

[#TidyTuesday](https://github.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday) is a weekly community challenge organized by the [R4DS (R for Data Science)](https://github.com/rfordatascience) community, aimed at those who want to practice data analysis and visualization. Every Tuesday, a new dataset is published and participants are invited to explore it, analyze it, and create their own visualizations, sharing their results on social media.

```{=html}
<div class ="button_wrapper_gallery">
<a href="https://github.com/stesiam/tidytuesday"><button type="button" class="btn  btn-primary btn-rounded"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> See Code</button></a>
</div>
```
::: {.grid .pt-3}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![Week 6, Tidy Tuesday 2023](https://cdn.stesiam.com/w06-2023-tt.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![Week 15, Tidy Tuesday 2023](https://cdn.stesiam.com/w15-2023-tt.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![Week 17, Tidy Tuesday 2023](https://cdn.stesiam.com/w17-2023-tt.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![Week 41, Tidy Tuesday 2023](https://cdn.stesiam.com/w41-2023-tt.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![Week 9, Tidy Tuesday 2025](https://cdn.stesiam.com/w9-2025-tt.png){group="plot"}
:::

:::

## <i class="bi bi-map"></i> 30 Day Map Challenge

The #30DayMapChallenge is a global challenge held every November, where participants are invited to create one map per day for 30 days. Each day has a different theme, encouraging data exploration and creativity through mapmaking. Apparently, I am still not good at that.

```{=html}
<div class ="button_wrapper_gallery">
<a href="https://github.com/stesiam/30DayMapChallenge"><button type="button" class="btn  btn-primary btn-rounded"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> Explore my code</button></a>
</div>
```
::: {.grid .pt-3}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![Public Music Schools in Greece](https://github.com/stesiam/30DayMapChallenge/blob/main/2022/day01/d1-2022-30dmc.png?raw=true){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![Railway Network of Greece](https://github.com/stesiam/30DayMapChallenge/blob/main/2022/day02/d2-2022-30dmc.png?raw=true){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![Public Buildings, Lamia city](https://github.com/stesiam/30DayMapChallenge/blob/main/2022/day08/d8-2022-30dmc.png?raw=true){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![Starmap of Athens](https://github.com/stesiam/30DayMapChallenge/blob/main/2022/day09/d9-2022-30dmc.png?raw=true){group="plot"}
:::

:::


## <i class="bi bi-globe-europe-africa"></i> Greece in Figures

Unlike the above, this chart category is not part of any challenge. It is a hobby project featuring interesting maps about Greece, focusing mainly on topics that are not so commonly explored.

```{=html}
<div class ="button_wrapper_gallery">
<a href="https://github.com/stesiam/Greece-In-Figures"><button type="button" class="btn  btn-primary btn-rounded"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> See Code</button></a>
</div>
```
::: {.grid .pt-3}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![Pharmacies in Greece](https://cdn.stesiam.com/GIF-0.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![GDP per capita](https://cdn.stesiam.com/GIF-1.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![Dentists per Region](https://cdn.stesiam.com/GIF-2.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![Heating Oil Consumption](https://cdn.stesiam.com/GIF-5.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![Electricity consumption, 2012](https://cdn.stesiam.com/GIF-6.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![Household Size, 2021](https://cdn.stesiam.com/GIF-9.png){group="plot"}
:::
:::

## <i class="bi bi-globe-europe-africa"></i> EU in Figures

```{=html}
<div class ="button_wrapper_gallery">
<a href="https://github.com/stesiam/EU-In-Figures"><button type="button" class="btn  btn-primary btn-rounded"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> See Code</button></a>
</div>
```
::: {.grid .pt-3}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![Unemployment, 2022](https://cdn.stesiam.com/EIF-1.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![R&D, 2021](https://cdn.stesiam.com/EIF-2.png){group="plot"}
:::
:::

## <i class="bi bi-bar-chart"></i> Other Visualizations

::: {.grid .pt-3}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![Most elected MPs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stesiam/Rest-ggplots/refs/heads/main/R4/r4-en-dark.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![Women Participation in DS](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stesiam/Rest-ggplots/refs/heads/main/R2/Women-in-DS/r2a-kaggle-women-ds-en-dark.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![Age Distribution (GR & Rest of World)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stesiam/Rest-ggplots/refs/heads/main/R2/Age-Distribution/r2a-kaggle-women-ds-en-dark.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![Statistics Depts minimum admission score](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stesiam/Rest-ggplots/refs/heads/main/R1/R1-Adm-Minimum-Grades/r1-adm-grades-en-dark.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![Admissions through Panhellenic Exams](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stesiam/Rest-ggplots/refs/heads/main/R3/R3-Panhellenic-Exams/r3b-en-dark.png){group="plot"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![Structure of Student Population](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stesiam/Rest-ggplots/refs/heads/main/R3/R3-Students/r3-en-dark.png){group="plot"}
:::

:::
